TypeError: diag() got an unexpected keyword argument 'diagonal'

llm_operation.reason: TensorFlow tf.linalg.diag requires 'diagonal' as positional tensor input, not scalar; MindSpore mindspore.ops.diag expects 'input' (not 'diagonal') and only accepts tensor input. Both frameworks reject scalar 'diagonal'=0.

TensorFlow tf.linalg.diag supports k, padding, num_rows/cols for general diagonal placement, while MindSpore ops.diag only constructs square diagonal matrices with input on main diagonal and zeros elsewhere — functional mismatch, not numerical error.
